quantification.why: Essentially every comparison carries a computed figure, e.g. 'North out-earns West by 1.54 times' and 'Sprocket moves 238 units (63.1% of volume) but earns just 15.8% of revenue at $4.75'.

specificity.why: Every recommendation names products/regions with figures and concrete actions, e.g. 'West trails North by 54% ($1,414.82 vs $2,176.35); redirect promotion to West'.

insight_density.why: Multiple actionable, non-obvious observations appear, including the mean>median skew from high-price Gadget orders and Gadget's '33.4% of revenue from only 16 units (4.2% of volume)' concentration versus Sprocket's inverse volume/revenue mismatch.
